subject: Re[2]: Nina
body:
Hi Jeffrey,
was so happy to see you,honestly!! you look great,even better than before :)
i am leaving on sunday then,if you will need me or will have time to meet with me,i am on the phone! 
and i am really upset about the news you told me,
i think i've just got over the first shock now and just have realized what you said me.
it's really terrible,i am so sorry.
but i do hope you will find a way to prevent this.. 95percent is not 100,right?
but will you be able to stay in contact with people?maybe use emails or sth.? or probably not?
ohh,can't even think of this,it all sounds unreal. i will pray for youu,hope everything will be fine.

And another big thank you for the book names you gave me,it will be very helpfull.
big kissssssssssssss
